sku.notes.placeholder: e.g.: order 200 units from supplier X
sku.reorder.title: Purchasing
sku.reorder.subtitle: When to reorder and how much, accounting for lead time
sku.reorder.noteTemplate: {date} · purchase: {qty} units for {days} d, lead {lead} d
sku.filter.thresholdHint: Change the threshold to recalculate the list. Press Enter or click outside the field to apply.
sku.filter.lowStock.label: Low stock
sku.filter.lostRevenue.label: Lost revenue
sku.filter.dead.label: Dead stock
sku.filter.oos.label: Out of stock
sku.filter.inactive.label: Inactive SKUs
sku.filter.frequentOos.label: Frequently out of stock
sku.filter.invConc.label: Inventory concentration
sku.filter.demandConc.label: Demand concentration
sku.cols.heading: Visible columns
sku.col.name: Name
sku.col.oosTip: Days out of stock during the period ({n}d)
sku.col.tveloTip: True sales velocity accounting for out-of-stock days. Shows the average units sold per day.
sku.col.coverageTip:
How many days the current stock will last at the current sales velocity.
Formula: Stock / TVelo sales velocity
sku.col.healthTip: Composite assessment of the item based on sales, stock availability and data quality.
sku.col.notesTip: Your comments and notes for the item. Exported together with the Excel report.
sku.filters.inactiveHint: Items with zero stock and no movement in the last 30 days. Hidden by default — no need to consider them in most cases.
sku.filters.periodHelp: Sales-rate calculation period. Defaults to the last 30 days. Automatically narrows to the pre-holiday window before holidays.
sku.filters.stock.label: Stock
sku.filters.oos.label: Days out of stock
sku.filters.oos.hint: Days out of stock in the selected period
sku.filters.lost.label: Lost revenue, ₽
sku.filters.lost.hint: TVelo sales rate × Days out of stock × Price
sku.filters.coverage.label: Days until stockout
sku.filters.coverage.hint: For purchase planning by average TVelo sales rate
sku.preHoliday.label: 🎁 Pre-holiday: {days} days before {holiday}
sku.list.noWarehouse.title: No warehouse connected
sku.list.salesTip: Actual sales for the period. Sales on restock or anomalous-data days are not counted; average TVelo is used on those days.
sku.list.confTip: Data confidence for the selected period. The more days available for the calculation, the higher the quality of the information. Factor this in before acting.
sku.list.lostTip:
Revenue lost because the item was out of stock.
Formula: TVelo velocity × Price × OOS days
sku.list.emptySelected: No data yet for warehouse «{name}». Wait for the first sync or check your filters.
sku.list.emptyNone: No data yet, or nothing matches the filter.
sku.detail.kpi.tveloTip: True sales velocity accounting for out-of-stock days. Shows the average units sold per day.
sku.detail.kpi.lostTip:
Revenue lost because the item was out of stock over the selected period.
Formula: TVelo velocity × Price × OOS days
sku.detail.chartEmpty: Not enough data for the chart (2+ days needed)
sku.detail.elasticity.title: Price elasticity
sku.detail.elasticity.sub: Velocity before and after a price change (minimum 7 in-stock days on each side)
sku.detail.events.title: Events
sku.detail.events.hint: All events except regular sales. Restocks, anomalies and recounts that affected the rate calculation are shown here.
sku.detail.events.empty: No significant events in the last month
